## For new editions — completeness checklist

- [ ] Skill definition with full source routing (Steps A-K)
- [ ] `scripts/api-dump.js` with all 6 subcommands (`fetch`, `class`, `enum`, `search`, `members`, `diff`)
- [ ] `references/source-map.md` with all sections (Context7, Official Sources, Status JSON endpoints, DevForum JSON endpoints, API Dump Workflow, Recent Change Tracking, Community Sources, Common Package Docs)
- [ ] `references/context7*.md` with MCP setup, all known library IDs, and routing advice
- [ ] `README.md` with installation and quick start
- [ ] `.gitignore` for cache directory
- [ ] No modifications to existing editions or root files (unless coordinated)

## For cross-cutting changes

- [ ] Updated all affected editions (routing logic, data sources, URLs, library IDs must stay in sync)
